app_release_notes: v1.2.28 - Now runs natively on Apple Silicon Macs: no Rosetta needed, and faster. Plus: drag your target photos straight onto the Measure screen - from Finder or the Photos app.

mac.app_release_notes: v1.2.28 - Now runs natively on Apple Silicon Macs: no Rosetta needed, and faster. Plus: drag your target photos straight onto the Measure screen - from Finder or the Photos app.

mac_arm64.app_release_notes: v1.2.28 - Now runs natively on Apple Silicon Macs: no Rosetta needed, and faster. Plus: drag your target photos straight onto the Measure screen - from Finder or the Photos app.

windows.app_release_notes: v1.2.27 - New 'Why this WON' explainer on the Best Load card: tap it next to the winning charge to see, in plain English, why the most balanced load beat the ones that topped a single test. Also restores the winner's green 'best in' check on the card, and the Loads tab now shows a name for every saved load.
